_description: Schema reference for pipeline_map.json — the WORKSPACE-INDEPENDENT definition of the full SNT pipeline flow map. It declares every pipeline node, its 2D grid position, classification, mutual-exclusion grouping, and the directed dependency edges between nodes. The SNT Pipelines Orchestrator webapp renders this map identically across all workspaces. Which nodes are ACTIVE vs GREYED-OUT is decided at runtime by joining node `id` against the workspace's pipeline_cards.json — it is NOT defined here. There is a single pipeline_map.json at the repo root, shared by all workspaces.
_generation_instructions: 1. This file is hand-authored and maintained, not auto-generated. It changes only when the official set of SNT pipelines or their logical relationships change.

2. Node `id` MUST equal the pipeline's Python function name (the first argument of @pipeline / the repo folder name, e.g. snt_dhis2_extract). This is the join key to pipeline_cards.json and workspace_config.json.

3. Place each node on the grid with `row` (execution stage, top-to-bottom; lower row = earlier) and `col` (horizontal position within the grid, left-to-right). Use distinct columns to separate parallel tracks (A / B / D).

4. Add one entry to `edges` per direct dependency (a required predecessor / data-flow link). Endpoints reference node `id`. The webapp derives lock/unlock state from edges — do NOT add a separate `req` field on nodes.
5. For mutually-exclusive alternatives (only one of the set may run), give every member the same `group` string and set type to 'alternative'.

6. Do NOT duplicate parameter definitions here — those live in pipeline_cards.json. The map carries only `label`/`code`/`description` for display, so that greyed-out nodes (absent from the workspace's pipeline_cards.json) still render a name.
7. `label`/`code`/`description` are the canonical display strings. When a node is active, the workspace card's `name` may override `label` for display.

_node_types.mandatory: Core step expected in every analysis.
_node_types.alternative: One of a mutually-exclusive set; members share a `group`. Running one marks the others not-run.
_node_types.facultative: Optional add-on; never required by downstream nodes.

_schema.version: string — date (YYYY-MM-DD) or semver, bumped when the map changes

grid.cols: int — total number of columns, for canvas sizing (optional)

nodes.id: string — Python function name; join key to pipeline_cards.json. REQUIRED
nodes.code: string — short human code shown as a tag, e.g. 'A.1', 'A.3.1'. REQUIRED
nodes.label: string — canonical display title, e.g. 'A.1 DHIS2 Extract'. REQUIRED
nodes.description: string — short subtitle shown in the sidebar (optional)
nodes.row: int — execution stage, top-to-bottom (lower = earlier). REQUIRED
nodes.col: int — horizontal position in the grid, left-to-right. REQUIRED
nodes.group: string — mutual-exclusion group id; REQUIRED only when type == 'alternative', omit otherwise
nodes.track: string — optional visual grouping/color hint, e.g. 'A' | 'B' | 'D'

edges.type: string — optional styling hint: 'solid' (hard dependency) | 'optional' (soft link); omit for default
